stock.label: Services Surface Stock Asset
stock.notes: Canonical stock placeholder for the Services section background surface role.

candidates.label: Nano Services Surface Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage services section atmospheric background image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage Services section background surface",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic low-distraction industrial surface image that adds atmosphere, materials, and modern engineering context without competing with text",
  "visual_message": "A refined industrial control surface with subtle depth, premium material cues, and restrained technical atmosphere",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "spatial-director-language",
    "color-material-control",
    "anti-stock-anti-hud"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the low-contrast panel texture and section-safe framing",
    "image_2": "optional industrial hardware material reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "50mm industrial detail photography",
    "aperture": "f/4",
    "light_source": "controlled workshop light with soft specular highlights",
    "time_of_day": "neutral interior light",
    "motion_rule": "static surface image with no human subject focus"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "primary panel texture sits off-center and low contrast",
    "no single switch, button, or label dominates the frame",
    "background depth remains soft enough for readable overlaid copy",
    "industrial hardware rhythm supports the grid without becoming cluttered"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium commercial industrial texture photography",
  "color_restriction": "charcoal, graphite, muted steel, low-saturation industrial greens and cyans only",
  "material_notes": [
    "matte industrial panel surfaces",
    "real switchgear or control hardware details",
    "subtle glass or acrylic windows if present",
    "no glossy plastic sheen"
  ],
  "scene": "A close environmental industrial control-panel or switchgear surface with believable hardware detail, modern engineering cleanliness, and restrained background atmosphere",
  "subject": "The surface and material language are the hero, not any specific labeled control",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible industrial control hardware",
    "clean panel geometry",
    "restrained depth and texture",
    "commercially usable background crop"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "16:9",
    "hero_safe_area": "preserve broad readable space for service copy",
    "focal_structure": "one soft texture anchor with minimal secondary detail",
    "camera": "industrial detail photography, slightly oblique but calm",
    "cropping": "designed for a wide section background"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial industrial photography",
    "mood": "quiet, capable, engineered",
    "contrast": "low to medium, controlled",
    "surface_behavior": "subtle highlights and believable material response"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must support layered service cards and white copy",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must avoid stealing attention from content",
    "must not contain readable labels, text, or UI",
    "must not feel like a generic stock close-up"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "bright warning stickers or labels",
    "centered button hero shot",
    "glowing sci-fi interfaces",
    "purple neon",
    "embedded readable text",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Promoted after homepage compare: lower-distraction industrial surface improves service-card readability and section consistency better than the stock image.
